---
title: "ACTT Validation Study"
subtitle: "Validating the ActTrust® actigraphy device"
description: "A fully reproducible R/Quarto pipeline validating the ActTrust® device for energy expenditure and physical activity classification, benchmarked against the ActiGraph® GT3X+ and indirect calorimetry."
date: "2024-09-01"
image: ../images/actt_validation.svg
categories: [Research Pipeline, Actigraphy, R, Reproducible Research]
---

## About

This project provides a fully reproducible analysis pipeline for validating the ActTrust® actigraphy device as a tool for energy expenditure estimation and physical activity intensity classification in young adults.

The pipeline benchmarks ActTrust® against the ActiGraph® GT3X+ — a widely used reference device — and against indirect calorimetry as the gold standard. All analyses are implemented in R and rendered as a Quarto document, making every step fully auditable and reproducible.

## Methods

- Bland-Altman analysis for agreement between devices
- Physical activity intensity classification benchmarking
- Energy expenditure estimation validation
- Fully reproducible R/Quarto pipeline

## Links

- 💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/circadia-bio/ACTT_validation_study)
